v1_1_phase: W2.T4 AUTOMATE — 2nd AIER worker = canon QA validator. Lane_01 self-approve under AMD_LANE01_CTO_AUTO_APPROVE_TECH_NON_CANON §3.1 YES list — Python worker + JSON Schema + workflow YAML + pytest tests are tech non-canon (this task READS canon/laws but does NOT edit them).
scope: Build aier-qa-canon worker — Python + GitHub Action workflow_dispatch only — validates SHARED/laws + CANON consistency (5 checks: cross_reference_integrity, redline_citation_coverage, amendments_log_coverage, frontmatter_consistency, pending_amendments_aging) → dispatch findings via dispatcher CLI to Lane_03 (canon owner). Complements aier-canon-guard skill (PRE-execute block) with POST-execute drift detection.

phases.B: contracts/canon_report.schema.json (NEW JSON Schema draft-07) + check_contract_files.ps1 update
phases.A: scripts/workers/aier_qa_canon.py v1.0 (~600 lines) — 5 check functions; CanonReport object; canon_health_score 0-100; modes (--scan-only / --dry-run / --self-test / --check NAME)
phases.D: tests/test_aier_qa_canon.py (10 pytest tests) — 5 check fixtures + schema valid + dispatch-to-Lane_03 + no-findings-no-dispatch + self-test + audit shape
phases.C: .github/workflows/aier_qa_canon.yml workflow_dispatch only — NO cron per R-RUN-01..06; inputs check_mode + auto_dispatch + target_lane (default Lane_03)

parallel_safety.verdict: PARALLEL SAFE — Lane_03 owns SHARED/laws + amendments (this task READS only); Lane_02 owns LANE_02/* (no overlap); only minor risk: tests/ may have race if Lane_02 is concurrently adding tests, but file name test_aier_qa_canon.py is unique to Lane_01.
parallel_safety.conflict_protocol: git pull --rebase before final commit + per-file conflict resolution if needed
